findings.description: Loss of tabular alignment in the memorandum header
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the contents of the 'To', 'From', and 'Subject' fields are vertically aligned at a consistent horizontal offset. In the HTML, they are rendered sequentially without maintaining this alignment.

findings.description: Hidden digital signature text is rendered visibly
findings.evidence: The HTML includes a text block starting with 'Digitally signed by LYF' between the 'From' and 'Subject' fields, which is hidden or exists as a non-printable layer in the visual PDF.

findings.description: Loss of list indentation for attachments
findings.evidence: The Roman numeral list under 'IV. Attachments' is visually indented as a nested list in the PDF, but it is rendered flush left as standard paragraphs in the HTML.
